creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Allow using sudo(1) directly in SU_CMD, e.g.

  SU_CMD=eval sudo -E

instead of

  SU_CMD=sudo -E sh -c

This removes some specific cases that presume `su -c' or `sh -c', e.g.

  $ su -c 'cmd1; cmd2'
  $ su -c 'cmd > file'

This shouldn't affect default usage

  SU_CMD=su root -c
